case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS SIMPSON, WILLIAM AKA SIMPSON, BILL

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, WILLIAM  AKA  SIMPSON, BILL
